name: RAR Pokédex API
description: Static catalog API for bare RAPP agents (single-file Python, BasicAgent subclass, perform()). Mirrors the RAPP_Store API shape so the rapp-zoo can browse all federation stores with the same client code. Each entry has a sprite, a downloadable .py (and .card holocard if shipped), lineage back to the species root, and stats (lines, size, sha256).
